assets.name: lecture_03_figure_01.png
assets.rationale: All four candidates are opening Stanford University title cards and contain no blackboard mathematics, lecture diagram, or classroom board layout. They are not useful as note-writing evidence and should be rejected.

assets.name: lecture_03_figure_03.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 04 is the best frame because it is the first one in this window where the vector equation on the left board is clearly visible and substantially complete, matching the subtitle exactly. The lecturer is no longer blocking the key symbols, and the frame also preserves useful board context from the previous derivation on the right.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: This in itself is a vector equation.
